user.title: Add XT211 HAN
user.description: How would you like to find the adapter?

scan.title: Network Scan
scan.description: Scanning network on port 8899... Select a discovered device or enter IP manually.

manual.title: Manual Entry
manual.description: Enter the IP address and port of your RS485-to-Ethernet adapter (e.g. PUSR USR-DR134). Default port is 8899.

dhcp_confirm.title: USR IOT Device Found
dhcp_confirm.description: Home Assistant automatically discovered an adapter at **{host}:{port}**. Would you like to set up the XT211 HAN integration for this device?

meter.title: Meter Configuration
meter.description: Specify your meter parameters. Only relevant entities will be shown.

data.has_fve: I have solar panels (FVE) / energy export

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the adapter. Check the IP address, port and network connection.
error.no_devices_found: No devices found on port 8899. Try entering the IP address manually.
